top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: HMT workforce management information: May 2026
top_signals.summary: This document details monthly management information on staff numbers and paybill costs within HM Treasury and its agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Chancellor backs former coalfield areas with new investment to end decline and encourage local talent
top_signals.summary: Communities in former coalfield areas of Britain will benefit from new jobs and business opportunities, as the Chancellor confirms investment in projects that support local talent and boost growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: OSCAR II – publishing data from the database: June 2026
top_signals.summary: The fourth and final quarterly OSCAR transparency release for 2025 to 2026.

top_signals.title: Kyiv’s drone leverage moved the US. Moscow could be next, a top Ukrainian official says.
top_signals.summary: After years of needing Western weapons, Kyiv is approaching negotiations with battlefield tech the U.S. now wants — and a possible ceasefire looming.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
